title: saraph #8314
definition:
1) serpent, fiery serpent
    1a) poisonous serpent (fiery from burning effect of poison)
 2) seraph, seraphim
    2a) majestic beings with 6 wings, human hands or voices in attendance
        upon God
nasbUsage:

    1a) poisonous serpent (fiery from burning effect of poison)
 2) seraph, seraphim
